commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Needs human security/product review of the broker credential model and real behavior proof before merge; an automated repair should not choose the auth contract.; Needs attention: the diff adds direct local operator-device provisioning but leaves credential delivery or signature-only auth unresolved.; Review finding: [P2] Provide a usable broker auth credential — src/cli/devices-cli.runtime.ts:1015-1017 - [P3... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `openclaw devices provision-local`, a local paired-device provisioning helper in `src/infra/device-pairing.ts`, and tests for local provisioning, idempotency, JSON redaction, and public-key mismatch handling.

PR surface: Source +298, Tests +259. Total +557 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. Current gateway auth returns without a device-token candidate and rejects when authOk is false before paired-device role/scope checks, so provisioning only a public identity cannot satisfy the PR’s stated no-remote-auth broker flow.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs human security/product review of the broker credential model and real behavior proof before merge; an automated repair should not choose the auth contract.
